text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 74 

CVRD_DAYS_ICF_IID 

LABEL: Count of Medicaid Covered Days in ICF for Patients with Intellectual Disability 

DESCRIPTION: The number of days in an intermediate care facility (ICF) for beneficiaries with an intellectual disability 
(IID) that were paid for in whole or in part by Medicaid. 

SHORT NAME: CVRD_DAYS_ICF_IID 

LONG NAME: CVRD_DAYS_ICF_IID 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE:
